COURT HEARING TRANSCRIPT — CASE NO. HC/S 1234/2024
Date: 15 January 2024
Before: Justice Lee Hwee Lian

EXAMINATION OF PW1 (Ms. Sarah Lim):
Counsel: Where did you see the defendant on 14 January 2024?
PW1: I saw Mr. John Tan at the carpark of Blk 45 at 10:32pm. I am certain because I checked my phone.

CROSS-EXAMINATION OF PW1:
Defence: Your police statement of 16 January 2024 says you saw him at 9:45pm. Which is correct?
PW1: I may have been mistaken in my statement. I believe it was 10:32pm.

EXAMINATION OF PW2 (Officer Rajan s/o Muthu):
Counsel: Did Ms. Lim give a time in her statement?
PW2: Yes. She clearly told me she saw the defendant at 9:45pm on 14 January 2024.

EXAMINATION OF DW1 (Mr. Ahmad bin Salleh):
Defence: Where was Mr. John Tan on 14 January 2024 from 9pm onwards?
DW1: He was with me at Changi Airport Terminal 3. We arrived at 9:30pm and left at 11:15pm.

EXAMINATION OF DW2 (Airport CCTV Records):
The defence tendered CCTV timestamp records showing Mr. John Tan at Changi Airport Terminal 3 Arrival Hall at 22:05 hours (10:05pm) on 14 January 2024.

END OF TRANSCRIPT
